stack: Next.js 16 + React 19 + Supabase + Stripe + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui

tags.webapp/: your Next.js 16 app — RSC by default
tags.webapp/app/api/: route handlers — Stripe webhook, oRPC entrypoint
tags.webapp/features/: feature modules — auth, billing, onboarding, design-system
tags.webapp/lib/: shared helpers — Supabase client, oRPC client, utils
tags.webapp/hooks/: custom React hooks — auth, theme, responsive
tags.webapp/config/: runtime config — plans, pricing, feature flags
tags.webapp/content/: MDX content — legal, docs, blog posts
tags.webapp/tests/: Playwright E2E — auth, billing, onboarding flows
tags.webapp/next.config.ts: Next.js config — PPR, cacheLife, Sentry wrap
tags.webapp/types/: shared TypeScript types + generated Supabase types
tags.supabase/migrations/: SQL migrations — RLS policies baked in from day one
